target.label: 8 June 2030, 00:00 WIB
target.note: The main countdown target — the tournament's official kick-off. Stored in UTC ("utc") so the countdown is consistent for everyone, wherever and whenever they access it. The displayed value is converted to the user's chosen timezone.

wallchartUnlock.label: 6 June 2030, 18:00 WIB
wallchartUnlock.note: The Wallchart unlocks earlier than the main kick-off countdown, once pre-tournament activity begins.

animation.description: Each digit changes with an animation similar to a subscriber counter: the old digit slides up and disappears, the new digit enters from below and settles into place. Applies to all 6 units (seconds, minutes, hours, days, months, years).

wallchartLock.note: The WC 2030 Wallchart page stays locked until the wallchartUnlock time is reached, then opens automatically.

timezoneSelector.note: Users can pick a timezone by city name (e.g. Asia/Jakarta, Europe/Madrid, America/Montevideo) OR pick a plain GMT offset (e.g. GMT+3, GMT-5). Not limited to Indonesia only.
